members.member:
This utility displays a warning with a list of mods that determine themselves to be incompatible with the current running version of Kerbal Space Program.
See this forum thread for details: http://forum.kerbalspaceprogram.com/threads/65395-Voluntarily-Locking-Plugins-to-a-Particular-KSP-Version
Delegate for Update and normal Start
Disabled instance of the VAB/SPH editor so that part modules can get at \a ship when they need to.
Simple wrapper to create a delegate for update or normal Start
Simple wrapper to create a delegate for coroutine Start

Find the start method and add it to the appropriate list.
Unity supports coroutine Start() (return IEnumerator instead of void) so need to check the return time.
Find the named update method and add a delegate to the list.

Run all the collected Start methods.
Both Starters and CRStarters will be empty on completion.

Enable (create if necessary) the editor
Disables all modules (including Part) and removes all colliders from the parts in ship. This means that Unity will not call Start or any of the update routines on the parts or their part modules.
Disable the editor and destroy the ship and its parts

member.name: T:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.ToolbarManager
member.summary: The global tool bar manager.

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.ToolbarManager.ToolbarAvailable
member.summary: Whether the Toolbar Plugin is available.

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.ToolbarManager.Instance
member.summary: The global tool bar manager instance.

member.name: T:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IToolbarManager
member.summary: A toolbar manager.

member.name: M:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IToolbarManager.add(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new button.
member.remarks: To replace an existing button, just add a new button using the old button's namespace and ID. Note that the new button will inherit the screen position of the old button.
member.param: The new button's namespace. This is usually the plugin's name. Must not include special characters like '.'
The new button's ID. This ID must be unique across all buttons in the namespace. Must not include special characters like '.'

member.name: T:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IButton
member.summary: Represents a clickable button.

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IButton.Text
member.summary: The text displayed on the button. Set to null to hide text.
member.remarks: The text can be changed at any time to modify the button's appearance. Note that since this will also modify the button's size, this feature should be used sparingly, if at all.

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IButton.TextColor
member.summary: The color the button text is displayed with. Defaults to Color.white.
member.remarks: The text color can be changed at any time to modify the button's appearance.

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IButton.TexturePath
member.summary: The path of a texture file to display an icon on the button. Set to null to hide icon.

remarks.para: A texture path on a button will have precedence over text. That is, if both text and texture path have been set on a button, the button will show the texture, not the text.
The texture size must not exceed 24x24 pixels.
The texture path must be relative to the "GameData" directory, and must not specify a file name suffix. Valid example: MyAddon/Textures/icon_mybutton
The texture path can be changed at any time to modify the button's appearance.

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IButton.ToolTip
member.summary: The button's tool tip text. Set to null if no tool tip is desired.
member.remarks: Tool Tip Text Should Always Use Headline Style Like This.

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IButton.Visible
member.summary: Whether this button is currently visible or not. Can be used in addition to or as a replacement for .
member.remarks: Setting this property to true does not affect the player's ability to hide the button using the configuration. Conversely, setting this property to false does not enable the player to show the button using the configuration.

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IButton.Visibility
member.summary: Determines this button's visibility. Can be used in addition to or as a replacement for .
member.remarks: The return value from IVisibility.Visible is subject to the same rules as outlined for .

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IButton.EffectivelyVisible
member.summary: Whether this button is currently effectively visible or not. This is a combination of and .
member.remarks: Note that the toolbar is not visible in certain game scenes, for example the loading screens. This property does not reflect button invisibility in those scenes. In addition, this property does not reflect the player's configuration of the button's visibility.

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IButton.Enabled
member.summary: Whether this button is currently enabled (clickable) or not. This does not affect the player's ability to position the button on their toolbar.

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IButton.Important
member.summary: Whether this button is currently "important." Set to false to return to normal button behaviour.

remarks.para: This can be used to temporarily force the button to be shown on screen regardless of the toolbar being currently in auto-hidden mode. For example, a button that signals the arrival of a private message in a chat room could mark itself as "important" as long as the message has not been read.
Setting this property does not change the appearance of the button. Use to change the button's icon.
Setting this property to true does not affect the player's ability to hide the button using the configuration.
This feature should be used only sparingly, if at all, since it forces the button to be displayed on screen even when it normally wouldn't.

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IButton.Drawable
member.summary: A drawable that is tied to the current button. This can be anything from a popup menu to an informational window. Set to null to hide the drawable.

member.name: E:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IButton.OnClick
member.summary: Event handler that can be registered with to receive "on click" events.

member.name: E:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IButton.OnMouseEnter
member.summary: Event handler that can be registered with to receive "on mouse enter" events.

member.name: E:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IButton.OnMouseLeave
member.summary: Event handler that can be registered with to receive "on mouse leave" events.

member.name: M:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IButton.Destroy
member.summary: Permanently destroys this button so that it is no longer displayed. Should be used when a plugin is stopped to remove leftover buttons.

member.name: T:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IDrawable
member.summary: A drawable that is tied to a particular button. This can be anything from a popup menu to an informational window.

member.name: M:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IDrawable.Update
member.summary: Update any information. This is called once per frame.

member.name: M:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IDrawable.Draw(UnityEngine.Vector2)
member.summary: Draws GUI widgets for this drawable. This is the equivalent to the OnGUI() message in .
member.remarks: The drawable will be positioned near its parent toolbar according to the drawable's current width/height.
member.param: The left/top position of where to draw this drawable.
member.returns: The current width/height of this drawable.

member.name: T:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.ClickEvent
member.summary: Event describing a click on a button.

member.name: F:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.ClickEvent.Button
member.summary: The button that has been clicked.

member.name: F:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.ClickEvent.MouseButton
member.summary: The mouse button which the button was clicked with.
member.remarks: Is 0 for left mouse button, 1 for right mouse button, and 2 for middle mouse button.

member.name: T:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.ClickHandler
member.summary: An event handler that is invoked whenever a button has been clicked.
member.param: An event describing the button click.

member.name: T:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.MouseMoveEvent
member.summary: Event describing the mouse pointer moving about a button.

member.name: F:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.MouseMoveEvent.button
member.summary: The button in question.

member.name: T:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.MouseEnterEvent
member.summary: Event describing the mouse pointer entering a button's area.

member.name: T:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.MouseLeaveEvent
member.summary: Event describing the mouse pointer leaving a button's area.

member.name: T:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.MouseEnterHandler
member.summary: An event handler that is invoked whenever the mouse pointer enters a button's area.
member.param: An event describing the mouse pointer entering.

member.name: T:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.MouseLeaveHandler
member.summary: An event handler that is invoked whenever the mouse pointer leaves a button's area.
member.param: An event describing the mouse pointer leaving.

member.name: T:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IVisibility
member.summary: Determines visibility of a button.

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.IVisibility.Visible
member.summary: Whether a button is currently visible or not.

member.name: T:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.GameScenesVisibility
member.summary: Determines visibility of a button in relation to the currently running game scene.

example.code: IButton button = ... button.Visibility = new GameScenesVisibility(GameScenes.EDITOR, GameScenes.FLIGHT);

member.name: T:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.PopupMenuDrawable
member.summary: A drawable that draws a popup menu.

member.name: E:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.PopupMenuDrawable.OnAnyOptionClicked
member.summary: Event handler that can be registered with to receive "any menu option clicked" events.

member.name: M:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.PopupMenuDrawable.AddOption(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new option to the popup menu.
member.returns: A button that can be used to register clicks on the menu option.

member.name: M:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.PopupMenuDrawable.AddSeparator
member.summary: Adds a separator to the popup menu.

member.name: M:KerbinHeavyIndustries.Toolbar.PopupMenuDrawable.Destroy
member.summary: Destroys this drawable. This must always be called before disposing of this drawable.

member.name: T:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper
member.summary: The Wrapper class to access KAC from another plugin

member.name: F:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KAC
member.summary:
This is the Kerbal Alarm Clock object
SET AFTER INIT

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.AssemblyExists
member.summary:
Whether we found the KerbalAlarmClock assembly in the loadedassemblies.
SET AFTER INIT

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.InstanceExists
member.summary:
Whether we managed to hook the running Instance from the assembly.
SET AFTER INIT

member.name: F:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper._KACWrapped
member.summary:
Whether we managed to wrap all the methods/functions from the instance.
SET AFTER INIT

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.APIReady
member.summary: Whether the object has been wrapped and the APIReady flag is set in the real KAC

member.name: M:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.InitKACWrapper
member.summary: This method will set up the KAC object and wrap all the methods/functions
member.param: This option will force the Init function to rebind everything

member.name: T:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI
member.summary: The Type that is an analogue of the real KAC. This lets you access all the API-able properties and Methods of the KAC

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.APIReady
member.summary: Whether the APIReady flag is set in the real KAC

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.Alarms
member.summary: The list of Alarms that are currently active in game

member.name: M:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.ExtractAlarmList(System.Object)
member.summary: This converts the KACAlarmList actual object to a new List for consumption

member.name: M:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.AddHandler(System.Reflection.EventInfo,System.Object,System.Action{System.Object})
member.summary: Takes an EventInfo and binds a method to the event firing
member.param: EventInfo of the event we want to attach to
actual object the eventinfo is gathered from
Method that we are going to hook to the event

member.name: E:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.onAlarmStateChanged
member.summary: Event that fires when the State of an Alarm changes

member.name: T:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.AlarmStateChangedHandler
member.summary: Structure of the event delegeate

member.name: T:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.AlarmStateChangedEventArgs
member.summary: This is the structure that holds the event arguments

member.name: F:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.AlarmStateChangedEventArgs.alarm
member.summary: Alarm that has had the state change

member.name: F:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.AlarmStateChangedEventArgs.eventType
member.summary: What the state was before the event

member.name: M:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.AlarmStateChanged(System.Object)
member.summary: private function that grabs the actual event and fires our wrapped one

member.name: M:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.CreateAlarm(KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.AlarmTypeEnum,System.String,System.Double)
member.summary: Create a new Alarm
member.param: What type of alarm are we creating
Name of the Alarm for the display
member.returns: ID of the newly created alarm

member.name: M:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.DeleteAlarm(System.String)
member.summary: Delete an Alarm

member.name: M:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.DrawAlarmActionChoice(KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.AlarmActionEnum@,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete an Alarm

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.KACAlarm.VesselID
member.summary: Unique Identifier of the Vessel that the alarm is attached to

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.KACAlarm.ID
member.summary: Unique Identifier of this alarm

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.KACAlarm.Name
member.summary: Short Text Name for the Alarm

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.KACAlarm.Notes
member.summary: Longer Text Description for the Alarm

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.KACAlarm.XferOriginBodyName
member.summary: Name of the origin body for a transfer

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.KACAlarm.XferTargetBodyName
member.summary: Name of the destination body for a transfer

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.KACAlarm.AlarmType
member.summary: What type of Alarm is this - affects icon displayed and some calc options

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.KACAlarm.AlarmTime
member.summary: In game UT value of the alarm

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.KACAlarm.AlarmMargin
member.summary: In game seconds the alarm will fire before the event it is for

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.KACAlarm.AlarmAction
member.summary: What should the Alarm Clock do when the alarm fires

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.KACAlarm.Remaining
member.summary: How much Game time is left before the alarm fires

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.KACAlarm.RepeatAlarm
member.summary: Whether the alarm will be repeated after it fires

member.name: P:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.KACAPI.KACAlarm.RepeatAlarmPeriod
member.summary: Value in Seconds after which the alarm will repeat

member.name: M:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.LogFormatted_DebugOnly(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Some Structured logging to the debug file - ONLY RUNS WHEN DLL COMPILED IN DEBUG MODE
member.param: Text to be printed - can be formatted as per String.format
Objects to feed into a String.format

member.name: M:KerbinHeavyIndustries_KACWrapper.KACWrapper.LogFormatted(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Some Structured logging to the debug file
member.param: Text to be printed - can be formatted as per String.format
Objects to feed into a String.format

member.name: M:KodeUI.UIObject.Anchor(KodeUI.AnchorPresets)
member.summary: Must be set prior to width/height

member.name: T:UnityExtensions
member.summary: Putting these in the global namespace so that they can be accessed from anywhere in the game without importing

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.Has``1(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: A shorter way of testing if a game object has a component

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.Get``1(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: A slightly shorter way to get a component from an object

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.GetAll``1(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: A slightly shorter way to get a component from an object

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.Get``1(UnityEngine.Component)
member.summary: A slightly shorter way to get a component from an object

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.GetAll``1(UnityEngine.Component)
member.summary: A slightly shorter way to get a component from an object

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.HasComponentOrInterface``1(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Checks to see if the game object has a component, accepts interfaces
member.typeparam: Type of component to check for (can be an interface)
member.returns: Whether the object has the component

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.GetComponentOrInterface``1(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Gets a component on a game object, accepts interfaces
member.typeparam: Type of component to check for (can be an interface)
member.returns: The component, null if it doesnt exist

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.GetAllComponentsOrInterfaces``1(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Gets all components of a given type, accepts interfaces
member.typeparam: Type of components to get (accepts interfaces)

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.GetAllComponentsOrInterfacesInChildren``1(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Gets all components of a given type including children, accepts interfaces
member.typeparam: Type of components to get (accepts interfaces)

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.HasComponentOrInterface``1(UnityEngine.Component)
member.summary: Checks to see if the game object has a component, accepts interfaces
member.typeparam: Type of component to check for (can be an interface)
member.returns: Whether the object has the component

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.GetComponentOrInterface``1(UnityEngine.Component)
member.summary: Checks to see if the game object this component belongs to has a component, accepts interfaces
member.typeparam: Type of component to check for (can be an interface)
member.returns: Whether the object has the component

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.GetAllComponentsOrInterfaces``1(UnityEngine.Component)
member.summary: Gets all components of a given type, accepts interfaces
member.typeparam: Type of components to get (accepts interfaces)

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.GetAllComponentsOrInterfacesInChildren``1(UnityEngine.Component)
member.summary: Gets all components of a given type in itself and the children, accepts interfaces
member.typeparam: Type of components to get (accepts interfaces)

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.AddChild``1(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: A shortcut for creating a new game object then adding a component then adding it to a parent object

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.AddChild(UnityEngine.GameObject,UnityEngine.GameObject,System.Boolean)
member.summary: A shortcut for adding a given game object as a child

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.AddChild``1(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String)
member.summary: A shortcut for creating a new game object then adding a component then adding it to a parent object
member.param: Name of the child game object

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.AddChild(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.Type[])
member.summary: A shortcut for creating a new game object with a number of components and adding it as a child

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.AddChild(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.Type[])
member.summary: A shortcut for creating a new game object with a number of components and adding it as a child
member.param: The name of the new game object

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.LoadChild(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String)
member.summary: Loads a resource and adds it as a child
member.param: The path to the resource to load

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.LoadChild(UnityEngine.Transform,System.String)
member.summary: Loads a resource and adds it as a child
member.param: The path to the resource to load

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.DestroyAllChildrenImmediately(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Destroys all the children of a given gameobject

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.DestroyAllChildrenImmediately(UnityEngine.Transform)
member.summary: Destroys all the children of a given transform

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.FocusOn2D(UnityEngine.Camera,UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Focuses the camera on a point in 2D space (just transforms the x and y to match the target)

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.ToUInt(UnityEngine.Color)
member.summary: Converts a uint to a color

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.ToColor32(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Converts a uint to a color32

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.ToColor(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Converts a uint to a color

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.ToHex(UnityEngine.Color32)
member.summary: Converts a color to its hex counterpart

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.ToReadableString(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Converts a timespan to a readable format

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.ToReadableStringShortForm(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Converts a timespan to a readable format but in a shorter form

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.RandomOne``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Randomly picks one elements from the enumerable

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.WeightedRandomOne``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{``0,System.Single})
member.summary: Borrowed from http://stackoverflow.com/questions/56692/random-weighted-choice Randomly picks one element from the enumerable, taking into account a weight

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.DebugLog``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{``0,System.Object})
member.summary: Loops over each item in the list and logs out a particular value, handy for debugging!
member.param: A callback in which you will return the item to log

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.AddOnce(UnityEngine.Events.UnityEvent,System.Action)
member.summary: Adds a listner to a UnityEvent which is removed as soon as the event is invoked

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.AddOnce``1(UnityEngine.Events.UnityEvent{``0},System.Action{``0})
member.summary: Adds a listner to a UnityEvent which is removed as soon as the event is invoked

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.OrthographicBounds(UnityEngine.Camera)
member.summary: Returns the orthographic bounds for a camera !! NOT UNIT TESTED !! Borrowed from: http://answers.unity3d.com/questions/501893/calculating-2d-camera-bounds.html
member.param: the camera to get the bounds on
member.returns: the orthographic bounds on a camera

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.Intersects2(UnityEngine.Bounds,UnityEngine.Bounds)
member.summary: Tests if two bounds intersect. This is neccessary as there appears to be a bug with normal Bounds Intersection. !! NOT UNIT TESTED !!

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.Clone(UnityEngine.Vector3)
member.summary: A simple clone method for a Vector3

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.Clone(UnityEngine.Vector2)
member.summary: A simple clone method for a Vector2

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.ToVector3(UnityEngine.Vector2)
member.summary: Simple method to turn a v2 into a v3

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.ToVector2(UnityEngine.Vector3)
member.summary: Simple method to turn a v3 into a v2

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.SetX(UnityEngine.Vector2,System.Single)
member.summary: Simple method to set the x value on the Vector2, returns a new Vector2

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.SetY(UnityEngine.Vector2,System.Single)
member.summary: Simple method to set the y value on the Vector2, returns a new Vector2

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.Randomise``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{``0})
member.summary: Takes a list, creates a copy and returns the newly shuffled list

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.SetX(UnityEngine.Vector3,System.Single)
member.summary: Simple method to set the x value on the Vector3, returns a new vector3

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.SetY(UnityEngine.Vector3,System.Single)
member.summary: Simple method to set the y value on the Vector3, returns a new vector3

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.SetZ(UnityEngine.Vector3,System.Single)
member.summary: Simple method to set the z value on the Vector3, returns a new vector3

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.ToRect(UnityEngine.Bounds)
member.summary: NOT TESTED !! Converts a 3D bounds to a 2D rect

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.Instantiate(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Instantiates an instance of this prefab

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.Instantiate``1(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Instantiates an instance of this prefab and retuns a component on it

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.Deactivate(UnityEngine.Component)
member.summary: Deactivates the gameobject this component is attached to

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.Activate(UnityEngine.Component)
member.summary: Activate the gameobject this component is attached to

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.LoadAllAsChildren``1(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String)
member.summary: Loads all the objects in a given path, instantiates them then adds them as children
member.typeparam: The type of the child to return
member.param: The parent object to add the children to
The path from which to load the prefabs

member.name: M:UnityExtensions.IsParentedBy(UnityEngine.GameObject,UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Recursively looks up the tree to see if this object is parents by the supplied

member.name: M:UnityHelpers.UnityUtils.CopyComponent(UnityEngine.Component,UnityEngine.GameObject,System.Type,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Type})
member.summary: Copies a component using reflection into a destination. Borrowed from: http://answers.unity3d.com/questions/458207/copy-a-component-at-runtime.html
member.param: The original component to copy from
The destination object to copy the componet to
A List of declaring types from which the property or field should not be copied from
If attribute is defined on property then ignore property

member.name: M:UnityHelpers.UnityUtils.Wrap(System.Single,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: NOT TESTED! Wraps a given float around between a lower and upper bound

member.name: M:UnityHelpers.UnityUtils.FindAllComponentsOrInterfaces``1
member.summary: NOT TESTED! Finds all objects in the game that match the given type be it an object or interface
